assessor_raw: Ticket escalation prediction experiment: transformer vs. logistic regression baseline. The design is methodologically sound. Operational escalation label eliminates annotation subjectivity. 36-month dataset with temporal split (24/6/6 months) mirrors deployment. Feature preprocessing is fit on training only. Both models receive equivalent tuning effort (20 trials/combinations). PR-AUC is well-justified for imbalanced binary classification. Secondary metrics (precision at fixed recall, ECE, per-product-line analysis) are comprehensive. Agent leakage is controlled via aggregate statistics. Scope appropriately bounded to same SaaS environment. Verdict: defense_wins.
